description: A painting showing a figure in the act of diving into a swimming pool, viewed from above or slightly above. The diver's body is stretched out in a V-shape with arms extended forward and legs trailing behind, captured mid-flight just above the brilliant blue water. The figure's shadow is visible on the pool floor beneath. The water is rendered in rich blues and turquoise with visible brush strokes suggesting movement and light refraction. The pool edge is visible at the upper left corner.
